title: Blind Spot Mirrors for Car, ILYPLUS 360°Rotatable Waterproof Convex Rear View Mirror Wing Mirror Rearview BlindSpot Mirrors for Universal Cars -2 Pack
features: Importance of Car Blind Spot Mirror: In the Blind Lane of Changing Lanes, Reversing, Turning Around, Starting, Turning, etc., improving the Field of View, Reducing Dead Angles, Eliminating Blind Spots, and Ensuring Driving Safety. Universal Blind Spot Auxiliary Wing Mirror is Suitable for Any Standard Car, Truck, SUV, etc., IP65 Waterproof, Rustproof, does not Damage the Original Cars Mirror after Removal

Superior Quality: True Glass, Round Shape Wide Angle, Optical Viewing Angle: 360° Arbitrary Rotation Adjustment and Rocking Control to Maximize Your Viewing Angle. Make the Vision Wider and more HD. Car Side Mirror, Lightweight Design for Long Life
AF Mirror Treatment: Waterproof, Rain Automatically Slips Off, Keeping the Mirror Clear. Powerful 3M Adhesive: Waterproof, Easy to install, Firm, wing mirrors is not easy to fall off

Borderless Circular Arc Design: Blind Spot Side Mirror, the Arc is Larger, the Line of Sight is Wider, the Frame is not Blocked, the Line of Sight is Wider, the Driving View is Expanded, the Blind Spot is Eliminated, and your Perspective is Effectively Expanded while Driving, without Disturbing you
What You Get - 2 Pcs Blind Spot Mirrors. Blind spot mirror for Car, Truck, SUV, Vans, UTV, ATV and RVs etc.
description: Product Description ILYPLUS's blind spot mirrors - An expert on Your Car accessories HD borderless wide - angle small round mirror - consider size, curvature, ratio, etc., tailored to maximize safety and enhance your driving experience Note 1. Do not exceed the edge of the side mirror 2. Press firmly after pressing, do not wash the car after pasting, just wait 24 hours 3. Folding the mirror before washing the car Characteristics 1. Compatible vehicles: Universal fit all cars 2. Material: Durable ABS plastic and high quality glass 4. 360 degree adjustable, get the best maximum image of vision 5. Waterproof, no fog, wide field of vision, effectively eliminate blind spots 6. Suitable for any road conditions, improve driving safety Auxiliary Blind Spot Lightweight design Expand field of view Eliminate blind spots Easy to install How to use the car blind spot mirror? 1. Thoroughly clean the mirror with alcohol or other glass cleaner 2. Strip the middle portion of the 3M adhesive from the bottom of the blind spot mirror 3. Stick the adhesive to the top of the mounting bracket 4. Remove the 3M adhesive protective eucalyptus from the bottom of the bracket and secure it to the side mirror Packing list 2 x Beautiful Blind Spot Mirrors 2 x Mounting Connectors
